queries.query: select * from "professeurs" where "professeurs"."deleted_at" is null order by "last_name" asc, "first_name" asc

all_queries.query: select * from "professeurs" where "professeurs"."deleted_at" is null order by "last_name" asc, "first_name" asc
select * from "matieres" where "matieres"."id" in (1, 6, 7, 9) and "matieres"."deleted_at" is null
